paper_name: Slalom: Fast, Verifiable and Private Execution of Neural Networks in Trusted Hardware (ICLR 2019)

paper_name: DarKnight: An Accelerated Framework for Privacy and Integrity Preserving Deep Learning (USENIX Security 2021)
threat_model_match: DarKnight: SGX + GPU coding scheme; semi-honest
unsupported_reason: general k>=3 coding, integrity coding, and full SGX pipeline not reproduced
safe_paper_wording: We directly implement the k=2 DarKnight additive-sharing skeleton over a linear layer.

paper_name: Amulet (matrix-obfuscation family); referenced as the static PHQ primitive
unsupported_reason: A generic invertible left mask P_t does not commute with token-axis concatenation unless P_t is block-diagonal aligned with the prefix masks. Refreshing P per step therefore invalidates the existing masked cache and forces re-computation.
safe_paper_wording: We directly implement the Amulet static PHQ identity and report the autoregressive KV-append counterexample.
